texto: It was not sympathy in the ordinary sense which he [Adolf Hitler] felt for the disinherited. That would not have been sufficient. He not only suffered with them, he lived for them and devoted all his thoughts to the salvation of those people from distress and poverty... his noble and grandiose work, which was intended 'for everybody'...
explicacao: Citação de August Kubizek sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It was not sympathy in the ordinary sense which he [Adolf Hitler] felt for the disinherited. That…” articula trabalho, dedication, devotion em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
